global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call to action and pricing information.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A circular shape with a light blue background, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.description: A rectangular shape with a light blue background, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small rectangular shape
elements.description: A small rectangular shape with a light blue background, positioned towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Book your next trip Hotels + flights in one tap', centered at the bottom of the ad.

elements.description: Text displaying the price '$4.99', positioned at the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Logo text
elements.description: Text reading 'WayPoint', positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE', positioned at the top right of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered at the bottom, and the CTA is prominently displayed.
